rationale: Review 2's finding that `map_proj` lacks `@[simp]` is real and grounded in the diff: `smul_eq_apply` (marked `@[simp]`) reduces `φ • e` to `φ.1 e`, leaving `p (φ.1 e)` unreduced without a simp-tagged `map_proj`. Review 1 misses this gap entirely, so acting on it leaves the simp chain broken, while Review 2 prompts a concrete fix.
